category_sources: Official Read the Docs page describes virtualenvwrapper as extensions for creating, deleting, and managing virtual environments.
source_facts.description says virtualenvwrapper provides Python virtualenv extensions.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use the virtualenvwrapper name.
